legalCompliance.eyebrow: For legal and compliance pros who protect the company but don't get the glory
legalCompliance.h1: You kept the company out of trouble. The P&L didn't notice.
legalCompliance.subtitle: Turn risk management into career opportunity.
legalCompliance.supporting: You've navigated regulations, managed legal risk, and kept the company compliant. But legal and compliance work is invisible when it works — and that's a career problem. The lawsuits you prevented and risks you mitigated deserve recognition.
highlights: Quantify risk mitigation and compliance value
Position for General Counsel, CCO, or business transition
Prep for legal leadership interviews
legalCompliance.ctaProof: For In-House Counsel, Compliance Officers, and Legal leaders.

proof.title: Legal pros have moved to GC, CCO, and business roles
proof.subtitle: Here's what clicked:

items.title: Risk has a price tag
items.body: What would that lawsuit have cost? That compliance failure? We help you estimate and articulate it.

items.title: Legal enables business
items.body: You don't just block deals. You make them possible. We help you frame it that way.

items.title: GC is a business role
items.body: The best General Counsels are strategic advisors. We help you position for it.

focus.title: Nobody celebrates the lawsuit that didn't happen
focus.subtitle: But someone should. And it should be reflected in your career.

items.title: Compliance is prevention
items.body: 'Managed compliance program' doesn't show you avoided a $10M regulatory penalty.

items.title: Legal feels like overhead
items.body: You know you enable business. But it sounds like you slow it down.

items.title: Is in-house a career?
items.body: You wonder if there's a path to GC or if you're stuck as 'the lawyer.'

steps.title: How we get you there
steps.subtitle: From legal counsel to business leader.

items.title: Quantify your impact
items.body: We estimate risk mitigation, deal enablement, and compliance value.
